title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War: Rising Conflict
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Luffy, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Take down as many as you can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're still alive, right!? Let's get ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Strawhat boy!!! Why are you standing around!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's go!! The old man is prepared!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Get the hell out of my way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But let me ask you one thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We stole a battleship!!! Quick, get on!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The execution platform is being destroyed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What happened to ace!!? Show us whitebeard!!

summary: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Luffy, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: rising conflict.
